item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings, online friends
more like, we all don't have Danny Devitos, so we use Christmas trees
unless i develop lactose intolerance or whatever i'm definitely a lifetime cheese consumer
this one messes with me
indeed
i laugh, but at the same time i do care what my dad thinks.. quite a bit
mmm hmm
never regret the saltines.
i hope you do as well
7 bucks went a long ways back then
she must like gabagool
i'll be honest.. i don't want to pet an isopod and i have no idea why they are in so many memes
maybe if i'm on a stimulant for some reason
gotta bone up on your basic french for this one
you might say they're... very.. not good..
this picture gives me anxiety
that's all for now.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Images of Note: version 6.6.6
item.description:
mood
IT'S A FRIKIN POSSUM
UwU
Apparently being controlled by a corporation is okay in their eyes???
"THEY DIDN'T TEACH US ABOUT TAXES!!!" "Yes they did, I remember it clearly in Maths Class." "NO THEY DIDN'T!!!!"
Then they had to march from there to Hastings to face the Normans where they lost.
This is a crime.
o7
"Hmm yes, how do we shoehorn Jesus into this".
This applies to all endeavors: Depression doesn't make you creative.
Never. Turn. Your Back.
The horrors owo
Former Australian Prime Minister Scott Morrison everyone.
:O
It will you know
"Facts over feelings" people when they believe that because they are emotionally attached to a position that it is "logical".
Lol by 5pm it's pitch black.
HELL YEAH
if you question why you need a poison socket they fucking shoot you.
they D A N C E
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay

item.title: When you first Knew: a trans dump
item.description:
Yes, I too would like to dress like this. But I worry that I’d get too cold… So now I’ll just have to try it and see :)
Hello there ;) It is she! Your friendly Imgurhood trans gal!
Today, I’d like to generally talk about The Realization. Per usual, if you just like memes, by all means friend, skip my blathering, ok?
Idk about you but my Realization came out of left field with a vengeance. Literally, one moment you could be browsing Imgur in the evening, minding your own business, then suddenly everything just magically clicks. Next comes the ‘oh’. OOOOOHHHHH. So That’s why xyz….
And after you get over feeling sheepish, dumb, and awestruck you may even just get really Really excited! Thrilled, even. Among a thousand other things, I began to understand why I really, Really like women.
And then I had to do something about my Realization.
But where to even start, you know? For me, taking time to hurry slowly, over the course of a year really helped me.
When I was younger I had this dream that I met this amazing girl. For years, I’d try to remember what she was like. It was only until after my Realization that I learned she was me all along.
Loving what and who you love is central to your own humanity.
Embrace that person you know and love, unapologetically.
Searching is ok. Creation is an ongoing act :)
How ever you want to call it!
Live your life, as you really are, how you like and can. Also, eat the good stuff every now and again ;)
Seriously. Like… seriously, tho.
I’ll leave off here I think…
I’d love to hear your own Realization tales. If you don’t want to comment them, just message me :)
It’s kinda similar?
*anarcho-socialist
We’re here for you, ok?
Far too often…
(We all are, but only we can steal and portray it just so)
This and onion and banana juice.
So hard. Worth every bit of it.
As a gardener…. And as a lover… *deep restful sigh
*MOST VIRAL edit You all!! I’m tearing up over here. But I’m not going to say thank you for me. I’m gonna say thank you for helping everyone else :) Good night lovely. We care about you. Morning is wiser than evening :) Love, Your fellow t-girl sisters of Imgur
item.dc:creator: RyanMcFlyin

item.title: Happy #InternationalMountainDay
item.description: We’ve been making War and Peas for over a decade now. In this era, we’ve created dozens of characters and hundreds of strips. Imgur has grown to an important platform for us and we are so happy to see so many people enjoying our comics. Nevertheless, we rely on the help of the community. If you can afford it, please support us on Patreon so we can continue to publish comics for free: https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: The 366th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - D&D MeeMays vol 1
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
Starting January 1st, I will have a new Signature Image. One I had commissioned. It's so cute. FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #DandD #DandDump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.dc:creator: amipretty

item.title: Consider this alternative:
item.description: We've done this the last five or six years. With just four of us, a roast of any sort is too much, leaves gravy and mash and other stuff in the fridge for days. Some homemade appetizers (sausage cheese balls, veg tray) and a half-dozen frozen ones from the grocery store. A few minutes to set up and bake. More time for The Good Stuff. Going to make a plate of this stuff for an old gal who has to work at the convenience store where I get morning coffee. She's mostly alone except for a couple of cats, and she has to work in two weeks when the store opens at 10am. Be excellent to one another, especially in this season.
item.dc:creator: prfesser

Register to vote and/or check the status of your voter registration by going here: IWillVote.com Be sure to vote in every election, including the “small” ones. The “big” politicians often got their start by winning the small elections. You can help weed out the bad ones early.

item.dc:creator: ShaydTheDragon

item.title: Excuse me while I go sob in the corner ...
item.description: I'm so sorry. So sorry that children must be subjected to the horrific emotional abuse of a society normalizing mass murder. So sorry that bulletproof backpacks are a thing for kids. So sorry that mom's kiss their babies good-bye every morning with this torture in their hearts. MV edit: I do not want this post to go viral. I don't want this post to exist. In a perfect world, I would be telling the story as a science fiction writer and you would be coming back to me saying "that's absurd, this kind of thing would only exist in a dystopian society and we would never let this happen."
item.dc:creator: inkican

item.title: Solid advice!
item.description: Get rid of dirty husband, yes. The pets stay.
item.dc:creator: TheOneWhoWasLeft

item.title: It's been a rough 2 weeks but things are finally looking up
item.description: 12 years is a long time to say goodbye to but it's clear we were holding each other back. He forgave me for my choice to leave and it's a massive weight off my shoulders. I feel like I can breathe again. Since I've broken things off he's already started pursuing therapy and even got himself a job! Its his first job in the 12 years we've been together and I honestly could not be any prouder of him. Just had to shout this into the void because I'm so freaking relieved and finally on my way to being truly myself.
item.dc:creator: Iridescent09

item.dc:creator: KaneKthulhu

item.title: Haven’t watched the movie enough to know if this is true
item.dc:creator: 1mthedude

item.title: Very excited to share our new home!
item.description:
The money shot! The house sits on a corner so we designed it to be visually appealing from the two sides. The back isn't bad either, but this is the view everyone will see.
Ignore the paint paper, all black is looking super sleek.
Living/dining/kitchen area. The house definitely is tall but the footprint isn't very large (a little under 1000sf. The first floor is half garage so this living area had to accommodate a lot of program.
Our studio room. Both my partner and I are artists, and I dab le.in music as well. This is our adult playroom, also might be accommodating for other adult play activities? TLDR: Two architects in love designed their first house together and no one said no so it's now getting built. This time last year, my partner and I were searching for houses, but of course found nothing in the area that we both liked and was in our price range. When we found a single home that we both were somewhat into, it got snatched up on Thanksgiving as we were showing the house to our parents. This lead to us joking a bunch about just designing our own... We found the property through the local land bank site, a government entity that sells small and foreclosed on lots at a significant discount to get the development wheels turning. All we had to do was sign a contract stating we will live in the house as residents for 5 years and pay the small cost. We designed this bad boy in like, 3 months, and got it out to bid. Our contractor has been incredible and we are beyond excited with how well this is turning out! House is done in March so expect updates! FP edit... Wow I didn't expect to blow up like this, just hoped a few people would notice. Let me clear a few things up. 1. The scale of the house is misleading, I assure each of you, natural light is one of the things we care about most. There is plenty! 2. The shipping container fad really ruined an interesting design style. We had no choice in the horizontals, that's part of the board and baten system. But no shipping containers were used or abused in the process. Lots of really great comments, please reach out if you have any questions!
item.dc:creator: Mjarchitect

item.title: My Dad died
item.description: It was sudden, massive brain hemorrhage, he didn't suffer. He was eight one, and we played online games together. I am going to miss the frustration of trying to teach an old man to just keep pushing forward to get up the ladder...just keep pushing forward... Love you Dad.
item.dc:creator: Nopinky2u

item.title: Tony Hawk's son and Curt Cobain's daughter getting married is the most 90s thing imaginable
item.description:
Riley Hawk and Frances Bean Cobain The picture above was shared by Tony Hawk and is from the wedding.
FP Edit: Forgot to mention the ceremony was officiated by R.E.M.'s frontman Michael Stipe, who is also Frances Bean Cobain's godfather.

item.title: Full circle
item.dc:creator: mushroommunching

item.title: Fuck the shareholders
item.description: I’ve worked at two different companies in 2023 and at both firms I’ve had to deliver (not decide) the awful news that we’re laying off the entire sales force. FreightTech has been a shit show and some of these founders believe in evergreen teams. Rather than help them rehire and rebuild I’ve now resigned both times and left with my teams. I feel for my team who is being let go just before Xmas. Taking inspiration from internet lore posted here I decided to spend the day helping my team edit their resumes, adding skills to their LinkedIn profiles and recommendations. I’ll be spending my holidays hopefully coaching them on their next interviews. The wild part is both companies have been financially healthy but anticipates a decrease in PROFITS so they’re laying off folks in advance. Not that they’d become unprofitable or unsustainable, they’d just make less profit. Fuck the founders, the boards, the exec team, and all the shareholders. PS if you’re considering a career in logistics or freightech really read those Glassdoor reviews hard.
item.dc:creator: traveladdict22
